indications.text:
Carefully consider the potential benefits and risks of VICOPROFEN and other treatment options
before deciding to use VICOPROFEN. Use the lowest effective dose for the shortest duration
consistent with individual patient treatment goals (see WARNINGS).
VICOPROFEN tablets are indicated for the short-t...

VICOPROFEN tablets are indicated for the short-term management of acute pain severe enough
to require an opioid analgesic and for which alternative treatments are inadequate.
Limitations of Use
